description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image and defines a before_script with Auto DevOps helper functions (setting DATABASE_URL, CI_APPLICATION_REPOSITORY, CI_APPLICATION_TAG, CI_CONTAINER_NAME, TILLER_NAMESPACE, and functions codeclimate, deploy, install_dependencies, setup_docker, setup_test_db, download_chart, ensure_namespace, check_kube_domain, build, install_tiller, create_secret, delete). Define two stages: canary and staging. Add a .canary job in the canary stage that runs only on the master branch when a Kubernetes cluster is active, is manual, and executes the script steps: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, deploy canary. Add a .staging job in the staging stage that runs on the master branch when Kubernetes is active, executes the same steps but calls deploy without arguments, and deploys to the staging environment.
